# DAI 2026

> DAI 2026 is the 8th International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence, hosted at City University of Hong Kong in Kowloon, Hong Kong, from November 29 to December 2, 2026.

DAI 2026 is the official conference website for calls, deadlines, venue information, organizing committee information, sponsorship information, and program updates. The conference focuses on distributed artificial intelligence, distributed AI, multi-agent systems, autonomous agents, agentic AI, distributed learning, computational game theory, AI for science, and deployed AI systems.

Canonical site: https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/

Organizer: DAI Steering Committee.

Venue: City University of Hong Kong, Kowloon, Hong Kong.

Dates: 2026-11-29 to 2026-12-02.

## Core Pages

- [DAI 2026 homepage](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/): Official overview of the 8th International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence, including dates, venue, calls, program overview, and sponsorship information.
- [Important Dates](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/dates.html): Submission, notification, camera-ready, registration, and conference dates.
- [Program](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/program.html): Program-at-a-glance for workshops, tutorials, paper sessions, invited talks, posters, and discussions.
- [Venue](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/attending.html): Venue information for City University of Hong Kong.
- [Organizing Committee](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/organizing.html): General co-chairs, program committee leadership, local arrangements, publicity, sponsorship, and contacts.

## Calls and Author Information

- [Calls](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/authors.html): Entry point for all calls for contributions.
- [Research Track CFP](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/research-track.html): Full research papers on distributed AI, autonomous agents, multi-agent systems, agentic AI, theory, methods, systems, evaluation, and applications.
- [Industry Track CFP](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/industry-track.html): Industry papers on deployed distributed AI systems, case studies, benchmarks, demos, tools, and real-world agentic AI applications.
- [Sister Conference Track](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/sister-conference-track.html): Non-archival presentations of relevant work accepted at related conferences.
- [Call for Workshops](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/call-for-workshops.html): Workshop proposal call for emerging distributed and agentic AI topics.
- [Call for Tutorials](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/call-for-tutorials.html): Tutorial proposal call for methods, systems, tools, and applications relevant to the DAI community.
- [Author Guide](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/author-guide.html): Submission format, review expectations, publication policies, and responsible AI disclosure guidance.

## Important Facts

- Official name: DAI 2026, The 8th International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence.
- Short name: DAI 2026.
- Location: Hong Kong.
- Venue: City University of Hong Kong.
- Conference dates: November 29 to December 2, 2026.
- Workshop proposal deadline: June 30, 2026.
- Abstract registration deadline: July 27, 2026.
- Research Track and Industry Track submission deadline: August 3, 2026.
- AI Paper Track submission deadline: August 10, 2026.
- Notification date: September 16, 2026.
- Camera-ready deadline: October 16, 2026.
- General co-chairs: Minming Li, Francesca Rossi, and Michael Wellman.
- Program committee co-chairs: Ian Gemp, Mengchen Zhao, and Ying Wen.

## Machine-Readable Files

- [XML sitemap](https://www.adai.ai/sitemap.xml): Root sitemap for DAI 2026 pages.
- [DAI 2026 sitemap](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/sitemap.xml): Subpath sitemap for DAI 2026 pages.
- [robots.txt](https://www.adai.ai/robots.txt): Crawl policy and sitemap discovery.

## Optional

- [DAI parent site](https://www.adai.ai/): Parent website for the International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence series.
- [News](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/news.html): DAI 2026 news and updates.
- [Sponsorship](https://www.adai.ai/dai/2026/sponsors.html): Sponsorship and support information.
